label: Linear MHD stability with stationary flow is governed by a non-Hermitian operator

provenance.source_span: REVIEWS OF MODERN PHYSICS VOLUME 32, NUMBER 4 OCTOB ER, 1960 On . .—..yc romagnetic Sta &i. ity o1': Stationary :~ qui. .i aria* E. FRIEMAN AND MANUEL ROTENIIERGt

strengths: Establishes that stationary flow creates non-Hermitian MHD stability structure.
weaknesses: Overstability possibility is broad and does not by itself determine the Atlas H3 stability boundary.
